content.en:
The gap between an ultimate-dimensional move that contains only one ultimate system and an ultimate-dimensional move that contains two ultimate-dimensional systems is too great.

However, if you want to create an ultimate dimensional killing move that fuses the two ultimate systems, the difficulty is also extremely terrifying, and it is undoubtedly a fool's dream for the peak of the Nine Realms to want to create such an ultimate dimensional killing move.

But Ye Tian has a lot of ultimate talent, and there is still hope to create it.

Even if it is really too late to create, it can also provide some foundation and insight for future creation.

So, for the rest of the year, he kept doing it.

He was going to combine the two ultimate systems of the Abyss Star Ultimate System and the Extradimensional Realm Ultimate System to create an Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move.

Time flies.

Ye Tian tried countless times, failed again and again, and often caused the replicating body to backlash, thus suffering heavy blows.

However, he did not give up, nor did he adjust his state, and directly created research in the most reckless way.

Anyway, he copied his body and condensed it casually, and there was nothing to lose.

In this way, it is getting closer and closer to the Ultimate Ancient Sea Present World.

this day.

Sea of Dimensions.

A replica body of Ye Tian was experimenting with a killing move.

I saw that he had the power of two ultimate rules all over his body, one was the ultimate rule of the transcendent realm ultimate system, and the other was the ultimate rule of the abyssal star.

The power of the two ultimate rules fused together to reveal a terrifying power.

"Broken!"

A bolt of gunfire erupted, tearing apart the dimensional void of the Dimensional Sea, and this terrifying blow had surpassed any previous killing move.

And after casting this killing move, there is nothing wrong with Ye Tian's copy body, which also means that there is no problem with this ultimate dimensional killing move.

"Hahaha, I still created a joint ultimate dimensional killing move, which is at least five times more powerful than an ordinary ultimate dimensional killing move. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, he gave this ultimate dimensional killing move a name - the Abyss Spear!

After creating the Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move of the Abyss Spear, he should now have the strength to injure the weaker Ultimate Realm Lord.

In the years that followed, he continued to practice the ape spear's ultimate dimensional killing move, and thoroughly mastered it, allowing him to perform it as he pleased.

Another time passed.

Rumble!!!!

Somewhere in the Sea of Dimensions, the Void of Dimensions shook, and a vast and infinite ancient sea descended, and countless rays of light shone on the endless Sea of Dimensions.

At this time, the Ultimate Realm Masters of many Ultimate Forces all knew that it was the Ultimate Ancient Sea.

As soon as possible, the Void Heaven Palace notified Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, the ultimate ancient sea has appeared~~!"

Yinduo Jizun came to Ye Tian and said.

"I'll go over now!"

Ye Tian said.

"You're too slow to travel, and the territory near the Ultimate Ancient Sea can't be teleported over, and the Void Heaven Disk can't either. I will personally send you over, you enter the Ultimate Ancient Sea as soon as possible, occupy an Eye of the Ancient Sea, and then use the Blood Sea Ultimate System Breakthrough as the Ultimate Realm Master, and break through before that one. Yinduo Jizun said.

"Thank you Yinduo Extreme Venerable Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately.

Yinduo Jizun took Ye Tian and shuttled quickly, his speed was faster than Ye Tian, I don't know how many times.

In a short time, Ye Tian and Yinduo Extreme Venerable had already arrived at the Ultimate Ancient Sea.

"What a lot of energy!"

Ye Tian took a breath, and he felt that his whole body was boiling, and there was an illusion that his strength was beginning to grow.

But in fact, at his level, it was already difficult to improve his strength, and unless he cultivated an Ultimate System to the Nine Ultimate Rule Realm, he would be able to improve his physical fitness to a small extent.

"Let's get in!"

Yinduo Jizun said.

Wow!

Seeing that there was a dense Eye of the Ancient Sea inside the Ultimate Ancient Sea, he randomly chose an Eye of the Ancient Sea.

And just after he entered, the Eye of the Ancient Sea was closed, and at this time, it was not easy for the peak of the Nine Realms in the outside world to enter again.

In this way, there will be no interference with mutual breakthroughs.

"Let's start breaking through immediately, otherwise that one breaks through, and my Blood Sea Ultimate System will not be able to break through. "

The ultimate power of the Blood Sea of the Nine Ultimate Rule Realm appeared on Ye Tian's body, and the Blood Sea Ultimate Body of the Consummation Realm also activated, and the terrifying Ultimate Will also exploded.

If you want to break through from the peak of the Nine Realms to the main realm of the Ultimate Realm, as long as you leave your figure at the end of the Ultimate System.

Like the Blood Sea Ultimate System, he needs to leave his own traces in the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

It's just that once it fails, the backlash of the Sea of Dimensions will come, and the peak of the Nine Realms will not be able to survive at all, and all the clones will be wiped out.

At this time.

The energy of the Ultimate Ancient Sea poured into his body, giving him enough energy to support him into the end of the Ultimate System and leave a trace.

In a flash.

The Blood Sea Ultimate System was embodied, and a Blood Sea Ultimate System path was crossed by Ye Tian step by step.

He can only use the Blood Sea Ultimate Body, the Blood Sea Ultimate Rules, and the Ultimate Will now, and other forces cannot be used on this Ultimate System path.

There seemed to be countless unknown and invisible barriers on the road ahead, Ye Tian smashed them one by one and continued to move forward.

In the back, the barrier is getting stronger and stronger, and it seems that it is about to reach the end of the ultimate system, but it seems that there is still a long way to go.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian was still impacting the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, and in a trance, he seemed to sense that another unfamiliar aura was also on this Ultimate System path, and the other party was slower than himself.

"It should be another Nine Realm peak powerhouse who has cultivated the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the Consummation Realm—the Nine Divisions Realm Master!"

Ye Tian didn't care about this Nine Divisions Realm Lord, and continued to impact the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

......

"What, there is also a Nine Realms Peak who has cultivated the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the realm of the Perfect Ultimate Body?"

The Nine Divisions Realm Lord was shocked.

He originally thought that it would be a sure thing for him to break through the Ultimate Realm Lord, but he didn't expect that there would be a Nine Realm Peak (King Zhao's) who intervened.

"Damn, it must be the Ultimate Realm Master who I have broken through to the Blood Sea Ultimate System!"

The Nine Divisions Realm Lord is desperately impacting.

Time passed slowly.

No matter how desperately the Nine Divisions Realm Lord tried, he still couldn't catch up with Ye Tian.

In terms of heritage, Ye Tian is even stronger, and he is the first to attack, so he is naturally faster.

Finally, after a long time, Ye Tian was already about to step into the end of the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

"Break it for me!"

With the blow that Ye Tian gathered all his strength, the last shackles were shattered, and Ye Tian came to the end of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, where his traces remained, occupying the Ultimate Realm Master of the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

In a flash.

Countless energies from the Ultimate Ancient Sea poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him to step into the tail of the Ultimate Realm's main realm.

Outside.

One Ultimate Realm Lord observed this scene.

"The first Ultimate Realm Lord is born!".
